micro_rules: Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.

rows.command_eng: Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.
If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.
If the oven is in grill mode, add 4 more minutes.
If the rice cooker is on keep-warm mode, switch it to cooking mode.
Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.
